title: Mystic's Biomes
description: Explore a world full of color.
body:
![Font Logo](https://i.imgur.com/Y4bgOJ2.png)

# Mystic's Biomes
Mystic's Biomes adds seven vibrant biomes to the Minecraft overworld, each bringing some new features to expand simple vanilla gameplay!

### Strawberry Fields
*Field full of strawberries & strawberry cows.*

### Lavender Meadow
*Serene meadow covered in lavender flowers.*

### Bamboo Blossom Forest
*Zen flowering bamboo forest of cherry blossom trees and peony bushes.*

### Autumnal Grove
*Cozy & warm autumnal hued forest of maple trees.*

### Lush Oasis
*Flourishing desert oasis sprouting lush greenery.*

### Lagoon
*Shores of seashells and sea foam.*

### Tropics
*Tropical rainforest dense of vanilla and hydrangea bushes.*

Est. 07.2020
